MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald E Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Preferred Realty Advisors,Inc. is present. Represented by Rigo Galdan.
Attorney Terri Brewer appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Jeff Hauschildt is present.
Attorney Sangeetha Rao representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Thomas Drohan , litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of June 17, 2013 vacated. (501/JPT)
